task_completion.description: Create a new Vendor Invoice for the specified business partner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Vendor Invoice' window is open and the Business Partner field is set to 'Joe Block'.

task_completion.description: Add a service or charge totaling $150.00 to the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The invoice lines tab shows a line item for a 'Service' (or similar charge) and the total document amount is exactly $150.00.
The document status of the Vendor Invoice shows as 'Completed' (or a similar finalized status in the ERP system).

task_completion.description: Create a Payment Selection batch using the correct bank account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Payment Selection' window is open and the Bank Account field is set to 'HQ Checking'.

task_completion.description: Use the 'Prepare' process to generate payment lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A process dialog for 'Prepare' is shown being executed, or a status message confirms the preparation process ran successfully.

task_completion.description: Ensure the created invoice is selected and included in the saved Payment Selection batch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Payment Selection' lines or details tab shows the $150.00 invoice for 'Joe Block' included in the batch, and the record appears saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard ERP application windows, menus, and buttons being clicked, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ERP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard ERP elements (like toolbars, tabs, and status bars) and is not a text editor or a mocked-up webpage.

integrity.description: The results appear to be genuinely processed by the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The system displays auto-generated document numbers, calculated totals, or standard status messages indicating real software processing.
